headline: How The WEC Energy Group (WEC) Story Is Evolving With Data Centers And Capex Risk
summary: Analysts are updating price targets on WEC Energy Group while the internal fair value model holds steady at US$123.09 per share, signaling no change to the central valuation anchor in this round. Those adjustments in Street targets are being driven by fresh views on earnings visibility, the US$37.5b capex plan, and how much future data center load is already reflected in the stock. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving narrative and what to watch next in...

headline: WEC Energy Group (WEC) Price Target Increased on ‘Strong Momentum’ in Wisconsin
summary: WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) provides regulated natural gas and electricity, and renewable and nonregulated renewable energy services in the United States. On March 24, Barclays analyst Nicholas Campanella slightly raised the firm’s price target on WEC Energy Group, Inc. […]
